sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54342" key="katalalhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταλᾰλ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n54342.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must talk against</tr_>, cj. in Thom.Mag.<bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Hib.:p.224R" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.224R.</biblScope> </bibl> (who censures it).</sense> </entryFree>
